title: ProviderKeyPoolState
description: Schema for the provider key pool state consumed by the WebUI Provider Settings panel. Extends provider-pool.json with key health indicators, secret source metadata, and auth event history. Never contains actual secret values — all fields are sanitized pointers and status flags. See docs/ai-native/provider-key-management-webui.md for the UI design and field-level documentation.

stateVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

providers.description: Per-provider key health and availability state. Each entry corresponds to a provider defined in provider-pool-policy.json.

keyProvider.description: A single provider's sanitized key health state. Contains availability fields from provider-pool plus key health indicators for the Provider Settings panel. No secrets — ids, source keys, and event payloads are opaque or masked.

id.description: Provider identifier. Must match an id in provider-pool-policy.json.

status.description: Provider availability status. available = has capacity and no cooldown. exhausted = quota/rate limit hit, cooling down. disabled = auth failure or manual disable.

currentConcurrency.description: Number of workers currently assigned to this provider.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent workers this provider can serve.

lastHealthCheckAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last health probe against this provider. Null if never checked.

lastFailureClass.description: Classification of the last failure. null if no failures recorded.

cooldownExpiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the cooldown period ends. Null when status is not exhausted or cooldown does not apply.

consecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive failures for this provider. Reset to 0 on successful recovery.

totalQuotaEvents.description: Total number of quota exhaustion events recorded for this provider across all time.

authHistory.description: Recent auth-related events for this provider. Newest first. Limited to the most recent 50 entries by the state writer.

keyHealth.description: Key health indicator for the Provider Settings panel. Derived from recent auth events — the UI never queries the provider API directly.

badge.description: Health badge state. valid = last auth check succeeded. auth-failure = last auth attempt returned 401/403. unknown = no auth check recorded yet. testing = auth check in progress.

lastCheckedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last key health check. Null if never checked.

lastProbeLatencyMs.description: Latency in milliseconds of the last auth probe. Null if never checked.

secretSource.description: Sanitized pointer to where the provider's credential is stored. Never contains the actual secret value — only the source type and a masked reference key.

type.description: Type of secret source. env-var = environment variable. credential-manager = Windows Credential Manager or equivalent. local-settings = local Claude settings file.

maskedKey.description: Masked reference to the secret key. For env-var: 'ANTHROPIC_*'. For credential-manager: 'lian-claude-*'. For local-settings: 'settings:api_key'. Never the raw key name or value.

label.description: Human-readable label for the source (e.g. 'Default Claude Code credential'). Copied from provider-pool-policy.json.

authEvent.description: A single auth-related event in the provider's history. All payloads are sanitized — no secret values.

type.description: Event type. auth-probe-success/failure = lightweight auth probe result. key-rotated = operator completed rotation workflow. mark-exhausted/disabled = provider state change. retry = operator re-enabled provider.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event occurred.

result.description: Probe result for auth-probe events. Omitted for non-probe events.

latencyMs.description: Probe latency in milliseconds. Null for non-probe events.
